revision.text:
To add an archives and search box to any talk page, copy the code in the box below (from this page right here, not by going into edit mode) and insert it (as is with no changes) after the talk page headers (all the other stuff with curly brackets at the top of the edit box). Copy the entire thing, including the two opening brackets and the two final brackets. {{align|right|'''Example archive search box'''   }} {{Archives|age=90|bot=ClueBot III|root=Talk:Macedonia|demospace=Talk}} This generates a searchable box with a list of archives similar to the one on the right. Code to be copied and pasted:
{{subst:Setup cluebot archiving|archives=yes}}
After that, a bot will be along in a couple of days to start archiving. This should work even if there has already been a previous manual archive. == See also == * [[Help:Archiving a talk page]], a more complete understanding of archiving and instructions for multiple options * [[Help:Using talk pages]] * [[Wikipedia:Refactoring talk pages]] {{Wikipedia archiving|state=collapsed}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia discussion]] [[Category:Wikipedia how-to]] [[Category:Wikipedia archives]] [[Category:Wikipedia help]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia pages
revision.text:
To add an archives and search box to any talk page, copy the code in the box below (from this page right here, not by going into edit mode) and insert it (as is with no changes) after the talk page headers (all the other stuff with curly brackets at the top of the edit box). Copy the entire thing, including the two opening brackets and the two final brackets. {{align|right|'''Example archive search box'''   }} {{Archives|age=90|bot=ClueBot III|root=Talk:Macedonia|demospace=Talk}} This generates a searchable box with a list of archives similar to the one on the right. Code to be copied and pasted:
{{subst:Setup cluebot archiving|archives=yes}}
After that, a bot will be along in a couple of days to start archiving. This should work even if there has already been a previous manual archive. == See also == * [[Help:Archiving a talk page]], a more complete understanding of archiving and instructions for multiple options * [[Help:Using talk pages]] * [[Wikipedia:Refactoring talk pages]] {{Wikipedia archiving|state=collapsed}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia discussion]] [[Category:Wikipedia how-to]] [[Category:Wikipedia archives]] [[Category:Wikipedia help]]

To add an archives and search box to any talk page, copy the code in the box below (from this page right here, not by going into edit mode) and insert it (as is with no changes) after the talk page headers (all the other stuff with curly brackets at the top of the edit box). Copy the entire thing, including the two opening brackets and the two final brackets. {{align|right|'''Example archive search box'''   }} {{Archives|age=90|bot=ClueBot III|root=Talk:Macedonia|demospace=Talk}} This generates a searchable box with a list of archives similar to the one on the right. Code to be copied and pasted:
{{subst:Setup cluebot archiving|archives=yes}}
After that, a bot will be along in a couple of days to start archiving. This should work even if there has already been a previous manual archive. == See also == * [[Help:Archiving a talk page]], a more complete understanding of archiving and instructions for multiple options * [[Help:Using talk pages]] * [[Wikipedia:Refactoring talk pages]] {{Wikipedia archiving|state=collapsed}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia discussion]] [[Category:Wikipedia how-to]] [[Category:Wikipedia archives]] [[Category:Wikipedia help]] [[Category:New]]

To add an archives and search box to any talk page, copy the code in the box below (from this page right here, not by going into edit mode) and insert it (as is with no changes) after the talk page headers (all the other stuff with curly brackets at the top of the edit box). Copy the entire thing, including the two opening brackets and the two final brackets. {{align|right|'''Example archive search box'''   }} {{Archives|age=90|bot=ClueBot III|root=Talk:Macedonia|demospace=Talk}} This generates a searchable box with a list of archives similar to the one on the right. Code to be copied and pasted:
{{subst:Setup cluebot archiving|archives=yes}}
After that, a bot will be along in a couple of days to start archiving. This should work even if there has already been a previous manual archive. == See also == * [[Help:Archiving a talk page]], a more complete understanding of archiving and instructions for multiple options * [[Help:Using talk pages]] * [[Wikipedia:Refactoring talk pages]] {{Wikipedia archiving|state=collapsed}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia discussion]] [[Category:Wikipedia how-to]] [[Category:Wikipedia archives]] [[Category:Wikipedia help]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
To add an archives and search box to any talk page, copy the code in the box below (from this page right here, not by going into edit mode) and insert it (as is with no changes) after the talk page headers (all the other stuff with curly brackets at the top of the edit box). Copy the entire thing, including the two opening brackets and the two final brackets. {{align|right|'''Example archive search box'''   }} {{Archives|age=90|bot=ClueBot III|root=Talk:Macedonia|demospace=Talk}} This generates a searchable box with a list of archives similar to the one on the right. Code to be copied and pasted:
{{subst:Setup cluebot archiving|archives=yes}}
After that, a bot will be along in a couple of days to start archiving. This should work even if there has already been a previous manual archive. == See also == * [[Help:Archiving a talk page]], a more complete understanding of archiving and instructions for multiple options * [[Help:Using talk pages]] * [[Wikipedia:Refactoring talk pages]] {{Wikipedia archiving|state=collapsed}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia discussion]] [[Category:Wikipedia how-to]] [[Category:Wikipedia archives]] [[Category:Wikipedia help]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Wikipedia discussion]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24543431184|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Wikipedia help]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24543431184|time triggered pipeline]]
